headline: Kyle Kelly
body: Liverpool U21s midfielder Kyle Kelly has signed a new one-year deal. The Saint Kitts & Nevis international’s future had been uncertain with his contract up this summer. Had some misfortune with injuries but shone in 2nd half of last season as a No 6. nytimes.com/athletic/7423280… Link The Transfer DealSheet: Latest on Man Utd, Arsenal, Liverpool, Real Madrid and more (Gift Article) This is the latest across the game's biggest clubs in the 2026 summer transfer window nytimes.com
raw_text:
Liverpool U21s midfielder Kyle Kelly has signed a new one-year deal. 
The Saint Kitts & Nevis international’s future had been uncertain with his contract up this summer. 
Had some misfortune with injuries but shone in 2nd half of last season as a No 6. 

nytimes.com/athletic/7423280…
